steps.title: Use the timing clue
steps.content: The second sentence explains that if the peccary died out before humans altered its habitat, humans likely were not responsible. So the blank must ask whether the extinction happened at the same time as the arrival of humans.

steps.title: Reject mismatched relationships
steps.content: A describes making up for something, not timing. B describes conflict or opposition, not simultaneous events. D describes one thing turning into another. The word meaning "occurred at the same time as" fits the logic. The answer is C.
